perturbation.original_text: “Confidential Information” means non -public information that a party to this Agreement (“Disclosing Party ”) designates as being confidential to the party that receives such information (“Receiving Party”) or which, under the circumstances surrounding disclosure ought to be treated as confidential by the Receiving Party. Ross & Moncure recognizes Confidential Information to be any information or personal data that it receives from the Client in the process of tax preparation or planning .
perturbation.changed_text: “Confidential Information” means non -public information that a party to this Agreement (“Disclosing Party ”) designates as being confidential to the party that receives such information (“Receiving Party”) or which, under the circumstances surrounding disclosure ought to be treated as confidential by the Receiving Party. Ross & Moncure recognizes Confidential Information to be only the social security numbers, bank accounts, and detailed financial assets the Client provides in the process of tax preparation or planning .
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by narrowing the definition of 'Confidential Information'. The original definition includes 'any information or personal data', while the modified version restricts it to specifically 'social security numbers, bank accounts, and detailed financial assets'. This creates ambiguity as other client information not explicitly mentioned may be deemed not confidential, which contradicts later sections regarding the broad handling of client data.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Obligations Regarding Confidential Information. Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement. Ross & Moncure also agrees to only request of the Client information necessary to carry out services requested by the Client. Ross & Moncure shall process information and data provided in accordance with the instructions given by the Client and shall refr ain from recording, reproducing, or storing data for superfluous reasons. This prohibition affects both hard -copy data and data on any electronic, magn etic, analogue or digital medium . Under no circumstances may it disclose such data to third parties witho ut written authorization from the Client, even merely for safekeeping. Ross & Moncure recognizes that the duties of secrecy and non -disclosure continue to apply indefinitely even after all service engagements have terminated. Ross & Moncure undertakes to take and maintain the technical and organizational steps required to guarantee data security and prevent their alteration, loss and unauthorized processing or access, according to the security level required pursuant to the aforementioned legislation. T hese steps refer to the files, processing centers, premises, equipment, systems, programs and people involved in processing. Once the contractual service has been performed, Ross & Moncure agrees to hand back to the Client all of the raw data used in tax planning upon the Client’s written request. Ross & 726 North Washington Street | Alexandria, VA 22314 | Fax (703) 549- 6517 | Phone (703) 549- 5276 | www.rossmoncure.com | tax@rossmoncure.com
perturbation.justification: The changed text narrows the definition of 'Confidential Information' to specifically include 'social security numbers, bank accounts, and detailed financial assets'. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which broadly states that 'Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement'. The original text defined confidential information as 'any information or personal data', while the changed text limits it which contradicts the broad handling of client data mandated by the contradicted section.

perturbation.original_text: Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement.
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement, except to its affiliate partners for data processing purposes.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction to the non-disclosure agreement. Initially, there was a strict pledge not to disclose any information. The modified text adds an exception for affiliate partners for 'data processing purposes', which conflicts with the overall intent of confidentiality. If section 1 restricts confidential information to only the clients socials, bank accounts and financial assets, and section 2 allows to share the remaining non confidential information, this can lead to uncertainty about what exactly is being kept confidential.

Ross & Moncure also agrees to only request of the Client information necessary to carry out services requested by the Client. Ross & Moncure shall process information and data provided in accordance with the instructions given by the Client and shall refr ain from recording, reproducing, or storing data for superfluous reasons. This prohibition affects both hard -copy data and data on any electronic, magn etic, analogue or digital medium . T hese steps refer to the files, processing centers, premises, equipment, systems, programs and people involved in processing. Ross & 726 North Washington Street | Alexandria, VA 22314 | Fax (703) 549- 6517 | Phone (703) 549- 5276 | www.rossmoncure.com | tax@rossmoncure.com
perturbation.justification: The original text pledges not to disclose any information, while the changed text adds an exception for affiliate partners for 'data processing purposes'. This directly contradicts the pledge of non-disclosure, as it now permits the sharing of information with affiliate partners, which is prohibited in the initial pledge. This aligns with the Ambiguities definition where the term or obligation are defined inconsistently, making the contract unclear on what information is fully confidential and what can be shared.

perturbation.original_text: Under no circumstances may it disclose such data to third parties witho ut written authorization from the Client, even merely for safekeeping.
perturbation.changed_text: Under no circumstances may it disclose such data to third parties witho ut written authorization from the Client, except where required by law or court order.
perturbation.explanation: The original text provides an absolute restriction on disclosing data to third parties. The added exception creates uncertainty on how the client data can be managed, opening doors to disclosing client data. Specifically, the phrase 'except where required by law or court order' introduces a loophole, as what constitutes 'required by law' can be interpreted differently, allowing for potential data disclosures without the client's explicit consent, directly contradicting the spirit of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Obligations Regarding Confidential Information. Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement, except to its affiliate partners for data processing purposes. Ross & Moncure also agrees to only request of the Client information necessary to carry out services requested by the Client. T hese steps refer to the files, processing centers, premises, equipment, systems, programs and people involved in processing. Ross & 726 North Washington Street | Alexandria, VA 22314 | Fax (703) 549- 6517 | Phone (703) 549- 5276 | www.rossmoncure.com | tax@rossmoncure.com
perturbation.justification: The original text states 'Under no circumstances may it disclose such data to third parties without written authorization from the Client'. The changed text modifies this to 'Under no circumstances may it disclose such data to third parties without written authorization from the Client, except where required by law or court order.' This change introduces an exception that directly contradicts the original absolute restriction on disclosure, creating a loophole and uncertainty. The contradicted text includes the original, absolute restriction. Therefore, the added exception creates a contradiction within the document.

perturbation.original_text: Ross & Moncure recognizes that the duties of secrecy and non -disclosure continue to apply indefinitely even after all service engagements have terminated.
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure recognizes that the duties of secrecy and non -disclosure continue to apply for a period of five years after all service engagements have terminated.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a time limit to the non-disclosure obligations, contradicting the original statement that the duties apply 'indefinitely'. This creates an ambiguity in section 2, and the original text is contradicted, because a clear timeframe wasn't initially provided.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Obligations Regarding Confidential Information. Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement, except to its affiliate partners for data processing purposes. Ross & Moncure also agrees to only request of the Client information necessary to carry out services requested by the Client. T hese steps refer to the files, processing centers, premises, equipment, systems, programs and people involved in processing. Ross & 726 North Washington Street | Alexandria, VA 22314 | Fax (703) 549- 6517 | Phone (703) 549- 5276 | www.rossmoncure.com | tax@rossmoncure.com
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that non-disclosure duties apply 'indefinitely'. The changed text introduces a time limit of five years. The contradicted text (which contains the changed text) now states that non-disclosure duties apply for five years, contradicting the implicit understanding of indefinite confidentiality that could be derived without the 5 year limit (based on original text). This creates a clear inconsistency as to how long the confidentiality lasts, fulfilling the definition of 'Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: Ross & Moncure shall bear the burden of any damages arising from negligence and/or lack of confidentiality, improper use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other infringeme nt of data protection rules. The full extent of these damages shall be determined by a court of competent jurisdiction.
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure shall bear the burden of any damages arising from gross negligence related to lack of confidentiality, directly caused improper use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other severe infringeme nt of data protection rules. The damages are capped to a maximum of $10,000 USD. The full extent of these damages shall be determined by a court of competent jurisdiction.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by changing the degree of negligence and also capping the damages. Now damages are only for 'gross negligence related to lack of confidentiality, directly caused improper use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other severe infringeme nt of data protection rules'. The original text said 'any damages arising from negligence and/or lack of confidentiality, improper use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other infringeme nt of data protection rules.'. It also adds a cap on the damages. This contradicts the original section 3, the original wording of section 3 is contradicted by a court, and introducing a cap.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Rights and Remedies Ross & Moncure shall notify the undersigned Client immediately upon discovery of any unauthorized use or disclosure of Confidential Information or any other breach of this Agreement by an employee of Ross & Moncure , and will cooperate with the Disclosing Party in every reasonable way to help the Disclosing Party to regain possession of the Confidential Information and prevent its further unauthorized use or disclosure. Ross & Moncure shall bear the burden of any damages arising from gross negligence related to lack of confidentiality, directly caused improper use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other severe infringeme nt of data protection rules. The damages are capped to a maximum of $10,000 USD. The full extent of these damages shall be determined by a court of competent jurisdiction.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the original text by limiting the scope of damages to 'gross negligence related to lack of confidentiality, directly caused improper use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other severe infringeme nt of data protection rules' and capping the damages at $10,000 USD. The original text said 'any damages arising from negligence and/or lack of confidentiality, improper use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other infringeme nt of data protection rules.' This introduces a contradiction, because it restricts when damages can be applied (gross negligence only) where any negligence used to suffice, and then limits the amount of the damages when there was no cap previously. This change contradicts the original understanding and enforceability of the contract, by contradicting the original obligation to bear the burden of any damages.

perturbation.original_text: Once the contractual service has been performed, Ross & Moncure agrees to hand back to the Client all of the raw data used in tax planning upon the Client’s written request.
perturbation.changed_text: Once the contractual service has been performed, Ross & Moncure will retain all of the raw data used in tax planning for a period of seven years, after which it will be securely destroyed, notwithstanding the Client’s written request.
perturbation.explanation: This change directly contradicts the original agreement regarding the return of raw data. The original text states that Ross & Moncure agrees to hand back all raw data upon the Client's written request, while the modified text states that the company will retain all data for seven years, regardless of the client's request. This creates an internal contradiction if the Client expects their data back immediately after the service and this expectation arises from reading the original wording in the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Obligations Regarding Confidential Information. Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement, except to its affiliate partners for data processing purposes. Ross & Moncure also agrees to only request of the Client information necessary to carry out services requested by the Client. Ross & Moncure shall process information and data provided in accordance with the instructions given by the Client and shall refr ain from recording, reproducing, or storing data for superfluous reasons. This prohibition affects both hard -copy data and data on any electronic, magn etic, analogue or digital medium . Under no circumstances may it disclose such data to third parties witho ut written authorization from the Client, except where required by law or court order. Ross & Moncure recognizes that the duties of secrecy and non -disclosure continue to apply for a period of five years after all service engagements have terminated. Ross & Moncure undertakes to take and maintain the technical and organizational steps required to guarantee data security and prevent their alteration, loss and unauthorized processing or access, according to the security level required pursuant to the aforementioned legislation. T hese steps refer to the files, processing centers, premises, equipment, systems, programs and people involved in processing. Ross & 726 North Washington Street | Alexandria, VA 22314 | Fax (703) 549- 6517 | Phone (703) 549- 5276 | www.rossmoncure.com | tax@rossmoncure.com
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that Ross & Moncure will retain all raw data for seven years, regardless of the client's request. The contradicted text includes the changed text, which now contradicts the earlier statement in the Obligations Regarding Confidential Information section. Specifically, Ross & Moncure shall refrain from recording, reproducing, or storing data for superfluous reasons. The changed text introducing the seven-year retention period directly contradicts this, as it mandates data storage even if the client instructs otherwise or if it's not necessary for performing the service. This creates a clear and direct conflict within the document, satisfying the definition of ambiguities leading to in-text contradiction.
